description: Define a Snowflake ICEBERG TABLE as Dagster YAML. Materialization runs CREATE OR REPLACE ICEBERG TABLE.

user.description: Snowflake user (NAME for keypair, LOGIN_NAME for password/SSO/PAT).

database.description: Database containing the entity (or where it will be created).

password.description: Snowflake password. Leave unset for SSO/keypair/PAT.

private_key_file.description: PEM private key file path (for SNOWFLAKE_JWT).

external_volume.description: Name of the EXTERNAL VOLUME object that points at the cloud-storage location (S3 / GCS / Azure).

catalog.description: 'SNOWFLAKE' for Snowflake-managed Iceberg (default), or the name of a registered external Iceberg catalog (Glue / Polaris / Unity / Tabular).

base_location.description: Object-storage prefix under the external_volume's root, e.g. 'iceberg/my_table/'.

sql.description: Optional SELECT body that defines the table data. If unset, the table is created empty (you populate it via INSERT INTO / external writes / Spark).

columns.description: Optional explicit column declarations when sql is None, e.g. ['id INT', 'name STRING', 'created_at TIMESTAMP'].

cluster_by.description: Columns to CLUSTER BY for performance.

retry_policy_max_retries.description: Max retries on materialization failure. Defines a RetryPolicy. Useful for transient network failures or Snowflake rate-limits.
